prompt: Use the dynamic mid-air pose and upward perspective from the reference image. Generate a computer graphics scene with a figure creating vivid particle trails and energy bursts during a jump, showcasing VFX.
prompt_refined: Generate a computer graphics scene. Utilize the dynamic mid-air pose of the figure and the upward, low-angle perspective from image 1. The central figure, captured mid-jump, should be actively creating vivid particle trails and intense energy bursts, prominently showcasing visual effects (VFX). The background should feature a bright, partly cloudy sky with distant mountains and a stadium structure visible in the lower portion of the frame, mirroring the overall composition and lighting from image 1.
objects: Central human figure in mid-air jump pose
Stadium structure in lower portion of frame
